_note: Jake's cards. Benefit amounts/cadences reflect publicly listed 2026 terms (Amex Platinum & Gold per the 2025 refresh). Every benefit is flagged 'verify': true — confirm each against your own Amex/Chase app, since exact amounts, enrollment, and end dates vary by account. All resets are on a calendar-year basis; the Sapphire Preferred hotel credit and Southwest anniversary points truly reset on your cardmember year, so switch those to 'cardmember year' + set the card's anniversary month if you want exact dates. Apple Card has no annual credits to track and cannot be auto-aggregated (Goldman Sachs blocks it) — import its transactions via Wallet → Export, and assign them manually.

benefits.name: Resy Dining Credit
benefits.description: Up to $100 each quarter at eligible U.S. Resy restaurants ($400/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Lululemon Credit
benefits.description: Up to $75 each quarter at U.S. lululemon stores (excl. outlets) or lululemon.com ($300/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Hotel Credit (FHR / Hotel Collection)
benefits.description: Up to $300 semiannually on prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection via Amex Travel ($600/yr).

benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.description: $15 in Uber Cash each month, plus a $20 bonus in December ($200/yr). Add card to your Uber account.

benefits.name: Uber One Membership Credit
benefits.description: Up to $120/yr in statement credits for an auto-renewing Uber One membership.

benefits.name: Digital Entertainment Credit
benefits.description: Up to $25/month on Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, Peacock, Paramount+, YouTube TV/Premium, NYT, WSJ ($300/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Walmart+ Membership Credit
benefits.description: Covers a $12.95/month Walmart+ membership ($155/yr). Plus Up excluded.

benefits.name: Equinox Credit
benefits.description: Up to $300/yr on an Equinox or Equinox+ membership. Enrollment + auto-renew required.
benefits.notes: Only worth tracking if you have/want Equinox.

benefits.name: Oura Ring Credit
benefits.description: Up to $200/yr toward an Oura Ring purchase at ouraring.com. Enrollment required.
benefits.notes: One-time-ish; delete if not buying an Oura Ring.

benefits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit
benefits.description: Up to $209/yr for a CLEAR Plus membership.
benefits.notes: Confirm this is still offered/at this amount after the 2025 refresh.

benefits.name: Uber Cash
benefits.description: $10 in Uber Cash each month ($120/yr). Add card to your Uber account.

benefits.name: Dining Credit
benefits.description: Up to $10/month at Grubhub/Seamless, Five Guys, Cheesecake Factory, Buffalo Wild Wings, Wonder ($120/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Dunkin' Credit
benefits.description: Up to $7/month at U.S. Dunkin' locations ($84/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Resy Credit
benefits.description: Up to $50 Jan–Jun and $50 Jul–Dec at qualifying U.S. Resy restaurants ($100/yr). Enrollment required.

benefits.name: Hotel Credit
benefits.description: $50 statement credit toward hotel stays booked through Chase Travel.
benefits.notes: Actually resets on your cardmember year — switch this benefit to 'cardmember year' + set the card's anniversary month if you want the exact date.

benefits.name: DoorDash Credit
benefits.description: Up to $10/month in DoorDash credits (non-restaurant: grocery/retail/DashMart) via complimentary DashPass.
benefits.notes: Confirm the monthly promo is still active on your account/year.

benefits.name: 5% Rotating Categories (activate)
benefits.description: 5% back on up to $1,500 in the quarter's bonus categories = up to $75 cash back. Must activate each quarter.
benefits.notes: This tracks the activate-and-max reminder, not a statement credit. Categories change quarterly.

benefits.name: Anniversary Points (3,000)
benefits.description: 3,000 Rapid Rewards points post after each cardmember anniversary. Not a dollar credit — amount left at 0.
benefits.notes: Actually posts on your cardmember anniversary — switch to 'cardmember year' + set the card's anniversary month for the exact date. Mark used once the points post.
